name: executioncontextprotocol
description: Execution Control Protocol (ECP) — open specification for defining, packaging, versioning, and deploying AI agent environments

scripts.build: tsc -b packages/spec && tsc -b packages/runtime && npm run build --workspace=@ecp/cli
scripts.test:unit: vitest run packages/spec/test packages/runtime/test/policies.test.ts packages/runtime/test/mounts.test.ts packages/runtime/test/engine.test.ts packages/runtime/test/evals-scorer.test.ts
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run generate:schema && npm run lint && npm run validate && npm run test
